# Geotecnia1 — Passo Fundo

> Geotechnical engineering services in Passo Fundo, Brasil.

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Passo Fundo, Brasil.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
